inputs.llm_raw_output:
Based on the provided summary, the patient has an intermediate aggressiveness, HER2-enriched tumor measuring 1.7 cm. 
Recommendation: Initiate neoadjuvant chemotherapy paired with HER2-targeted therapy (such as Trastuzumab) prior to surgical intervention.

rag_escalation.verbatim_citation: NCCN 2026: For HER2-positive tumors >1cm, recommend neoadjuvant targeted therapy (Trastuzumab/Pertuzumab) combined with chemotherapy (Taxane). [Source: NCCN Breast Cancer V.1.2026, Page 42]
